relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains pre-approved credit offer details (marketing to credit), while the outbound file reports arrears status (credit to customer services). These represent fundamentally different business processes: offer generation vs. delinquency reporting. No meaningful field overlap exists; customer_id and account_number appear in both but serve entirely different contexts. The outbound file's core payload (arrears amounts, payment dates, risk levels) has no source in an offer-generation inbound file.
